import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

databasename = "aemo_bronze"
tablename = "nem12_bronze"
tablename_temp = "nem12_bronze_temp"
backup_tablename = "nem12_bronze_16519"
destination_path = "AEMO/NEM12"
staging_table = 'nem12_brtemp'

# Only execute when you want to delete backup
#Drop table and storage folder if exists 
from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {databasename}.{staging_table}""")

try:
    raw_output_path = f"""abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{staging_table}"""
    mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

    print("Delete successful")

except Py4JJavaError as error :
    if 'org.apache.hadoop.fs.PathNotFoundException' in str (error.java_exception):
        print("No such file or directory")

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {databasename};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {databasename}.{staging_table}
(
    Nem12HashKey STRING,
    CDC_LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    MSATSLoadDateTime STRING,
    CreationDate STRING, 
    VersionHeader STRING,
    Timestamp TIMESTAMP,
    DisplayTimestamp_d STRING,
    FromParticipant STRING,
    ToParticipant STRING,
    NMI STRING,
    NMIConfiguration STRING,
    RegisterID STRING,
    NMISuffix STRING,
    MDMDataStreamIdentifier STRING,
    MeterSerialNumber STRING, 
    UnitOfMeasurementId STRING,
    IntervalLength DOUBLE,
    IntervalIndex INT,
    IntervalDate STRING, 
    NextScheduledReadDate STRING, 
    Usage DOUBLE, 
    FinalQualityMethodId STRING, 
    FinalReasonCodeId STRING, 
    QualityMethodId STRING,
    ReasonCodeId STRING,
    ReasonDescription STRING, 
    NormalizedTimeStart STRING,
    NormalizedTimeEnd STRING,
    TransCodeId STRING, 
    RetServiceOrder STRING, 
    ReadDatetime STRING,
    IndexRead STRING,
    FileName STRING
     
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{staging_table}'

#select all the records
raw_df = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT      b.Nem12HashKey
                                    ,b.FileName
                                    ,b.CDC_LoadDate
                                    ,b.MSATSLoadDateTime
                                    ,b.CreationDate
                                    ,b.VersionHeader
                                    ,b.Timestamp
                                    ,b.DisplayTimestamp_d
                                    ,b.FromParticipant
                                    ,b.ToParticipant
                                    ,b.NMI
                                    ,b.NMIConfiguration
                                    ,b.RegisterID
                                    ,b.NMISuffix
                                    ,b.MDMDataStreamIdentifier
                                    ,b.MeterSerialNumber
                                    ,b.UnitOfMeasurementId
                                    ,b.IntervalLength
                                    ,b.IntervalIndex
                                    ,b.IntervalDate
                                    ,b.NextScheduledReadDate
                                    ,b.Usage
                                    ,b.FinalQualityMethodId
                                    ,b.FinalReasonCodeId
                                    ,b.QualityMethodId
                                    ,b.ReasonCodeId
                                    ,b.ReasonDescription
                                    ,b.NormalizedTimeStart
                                    ,b.NormalizedTimeEnd
                                    ,b.TransCodeId
                                    ,b.RetServiceOrder
                                    ,b.ReadDatetime
                                    ,b.IndexRead
                            FROM {databasename}.{tablename} b
                            LEFT JOIN {databasename}.{tablename_temp} bt on bt.Nem12HashKey = b.Nem12HashKey and bt.FileName = b.FileName
                            WHERE bt.FileName IS NULL
                        UNION ALL
                        SELECT      Nem12HashKey
                                    ,FileName
                                    ,CDC_LoadDate
                                    ,MSATSLoadDateTime
                                    ,CreationDate
                                    ,VersionHeader
                                    ,Timestamp
                                    ,DisplayTimestamp_d
                                    ,FromParticipant
                                    ,ToParticipant
                                    ,NMI
                                    ,NMIConfiguration
                                    ,RegisterID
                                    ,NMISuffix
                                    ,MDMDataStreamIdentifier
                                    ,MeterSerialNumber
                                    ,UnitOfMeasurementId
                                    ,IntervalLength
                                    ,IntervalIndex
                                    ,IntervalDate
                                    ,NextScheduledReadDate
                                    ,Usage
                                    ,FinalQualityMethodId
                                    ,FinalReasonCodeId
                                    ,QualityMethodId
                                    ,ReasonCodeId
                                    ,ReasonDescription
                                    ,NormalizedTimeStart
                                    ,NormalizedTimeEnd
                                    ,TransCodeId
                                    ,RetServiceOrder
                                    ,ReadDatetime
                                    ,IndexRead               
                        FROM {databasename}.{tablename_temp}

#select all the records
raw_df1 = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT      b.Nem12HashKey
                                    ,b.FileName
                                    ,b.CDC_LoadDate
                                    ,b.MSATSLoadDateTime
                                    ,b.CreationDate
                                    ,b.VersionHeader
                                    ,b.Timestamp
                                    ,b.DisplayTimestamp_d
                                    ,b.FromParticipant
                                    ,b.ToParticipant
                                    ,b.NMI
                                    ,b.NMIConfiguration
                                    ,b.RegisterID
                                    ,b.NMISuffix
                                    ,b.MDMDataStreamIdentifier
                                    ,b.MeterSerialNumber
                                    ,b.UnitOfMeasurementId
                                    ,b.IntervalLength
                                    ,b.IntervalIndex
                                    ,b.IntervalDate
                                    ,b.NextScheduledReadDate
                                    ,b.Usage
                                    ,b.FinalQualityMethodId
                                    ,b.FinalReasonCodeId
                                    ,b.QualityMethodId
                                    ,b.ReasonCodeId
                                    ,b.ReasonDescription
                                    ,b.NormalizedTimeStart
                                    ,b.NormalizedTimeEnd
                                    ,b.TransCodeId
                                    ,b.RetServiceOrder
                                    ,b.ReadDatetime
                                    ,b.IndexRead
                            FROM {databasename}.{tablename} b
                            LEFT JOIN {databasename}.{tablename_temp} bt on bt.Nem12HashKey = b.Nem12HashKey and bt.FileName = b.FileName
                            WHERE bt.FileName IS NULL
                    """)
#select all the records
raw_df2 = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT      Nem12HashKey
                                    ,FileName
                                    ,CDC_LoadDate
                                    ,MSATSLoadDateTime
                                    ,CreationDate
                                    ,VersionHeader
                                    ,Timestamp
                                    ,DisplayTimestamp_d
                                    ,FromParticipant
                                    ,ToParticipant
                                    ,NMI
                                    ,NMIConfiguration
                                    ,RegisterID
                                    ,NMISuffix
                                    ,MDMDataStreamIdentifier
                                    ,MeterSerialNumber
                                    ,UnitOfMeasurementId
                                    ,IntervalLength
                                    ,IntervalIndex
                                    ,IntervalDate
                                    ,NextScheduledReadDate
                                    ,Usage
                                    ,FinalQualityMethodId
                                    ,FinalReasonCodeId
                                    ,QualityMethodId
                                    ,ReasonCodeId
                                    ,ReasonDescription
                                    ,NormalizedTimeStart
                                    ,NormalizedTimeEnd
                                    ,TransCodeId
                                    ,RetServiceOrder
                                    ,ReadDatetime
                                    ,IndexRead               
                        FROM {databasename}.{tablename_temp}

from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import DateType

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

spark.sql(f"""
      INSERT INTO {databasename}.{staging_table}
        (VersionHeader,CreationDate,Timestamp,DisplayTimestamp_d,FromParticipant,ToParticipant,NMI,NMIConfiguration,RegisterID,NMISuffix,
        MDMDataStreamIdentifier,MeterSerialNumber, UnitOfMeasurementId, IntervalLength, IntervalIndex,IntervalDate, NextScheduledReadDate, 
        Usage, FinalQualityMethodId,FinalReasonCodeId, MSATSLoadDateTime, QualityMethodId, ReasonCodeId, ReasonDescription,
        NormalizedTimeStart,NormalizedTimeEnd, TransCodeId, RetServiceOrder, ReadDatetime, IndexRead,FileName,
        CDC_LoadDate, Nem12HashKey)
        SELECT s.VersionHeader,s.CreationDate,s.Timestamp,s.DisplayTimestamp_d,s.FromParticipant,s.ToParticipant,s.NMI,s.NMIConfiguration,s.RegisterID,s.NMISuffix,
        s.MDMDataStreamIdentifier,s.MeterSerialNumber, s.UnitOfMeasurementId, s.IntervalLength, s.IntervalIndex,s.IntervalDate, s.NextScheduledReadDate, 
        s.Usage, s.FinalQualityMethodId,s.FinalReasonCodeId, s.MSATSLoadDateTime, s.QualityMethodId, s.ReasonCodeId, s.ReasonDescription,
        s.NormalizedTimeStart,s.NormalizedTimeEnd, s.TransCodeId, s.RetServiceOrder, s.ReadDatetime, s.IndexRead, s.FileName,
        s.CDC_LoadDate, s.Nem12HashKey
        FROM temp_table s;

# Only execute when you want to delete backup
#Drop table and storage folder if exists 
from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {databasename}.{tablename}""")

try:
    raw_output_path = f"""abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{tablename}"""
    mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

    print("Delete successful")

except Py4JJavaError as error :
    if 'org.apache.hadoop.fs.PathNotFoundException' in str (error.java_exception):
        print("No such file or directory")

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {databasename};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {databasename}.{tablename}
(
    Nem12HashKey STRING,
    CDC_LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    MSATSLoadDateTime STRING,
    CreationDate STRING, 
    VersionHeader STRING,
    Timestamp TIMESTAMP,
    DisplayTimestamp_d STRING,
    FromParticipant STRING,
    ToParticipant STRING,
    NMI STRING,
    NMIConfiguration STRING,
    RegisterID STRING,
    NMISuffix STRING,
    MDMDataStreamIdentifier STRING,
    MeterSerialNumber STRING, 
    UnitOfMeasurementId STRING,
    IntervalLength DOUBLE,
    IntervalIndex INT,
    IntervalDate STRING, 
    NextScheduledReadDate STRING, 
    Usage DOUBLE, 
    FinalQualityMethodId STRING, 
    FinalReasonCodeId STRING, 
    QualityMethodId STRING,
    ReasonCodeId STRING,
    ReasonDescription STRING, 
    NormalizedTimeStart STRING,
    NormalizedTimeEnd STRING,
    TransCodeId STRING, 
    RetServiceOrder STRING, 
    ReadDatetime STRING,
    IndexRead STRING,
    FileName STRING
     
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{tablename}'

#select all the records
raw_df = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT *        
                        FROM {databasename}.{staging_table}

from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import DateType

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

spark.sql(f"""
      INSERT INTO {databasename}.{tablename}
        (VersionHeader,CreationDate,Timestamp,DisplayTimestamp_d,FromParticipant,ToParticipant,NMI,NMIConfiguration,RegisterID,NMISuffix,
        MDMDataStreamIdentifier,MeterSerialNumber, UnitOfMeasurementId, IntervalLength, IntervalIndex,IntervalDate, NextScheduledReadDate, 
        Usage, FinalQualityMethodId,FinalReasonCodeId, MSATSLoadDateTime, QualityMethodId, ReasonCodeId, ReasonDescription,
        NormalizedTimeStart,NormalizedTimeEnd, TransCodeId, RetServiceOrder, ReadDatetime, IndexRead,FileName,
        CDC_LoadDate, Nem12HashKey)
        SELECT s.VersionHeader,s.CreationDate,s.Timestamp,s.DisplayTimestamp_d,s.FromParticipant,s.ToParticipant,s.NMI,s.NMIConfiguration,s.RegisterID,s.NMISuffix,
        s.MDMDataStreamIdentifier,s.MeterSerialNumber, s.UnitOfMeasurementId, s.IntervalLength, s.IntervalIndex,s.IntervalDate, s.NextScheduledReadDate, 
        s.Usage, s.FinalQualityMethodId,s.FinalReasonCodeId, s.MSATSLoadDateTime, s.QualityMethodId, s.ReasonCodeId, s.ReasonDescription,
        s.NormalizedTimeStart,s.NormalizedTimeEnd, s.TransCodeId, s.RetServiceOrder, s.ReadDatetime, s.IndexRead, s.FileName,
        s.CDC_LoadDate, s.Nem12HashKey
        FROM temp_table s;
